input_source: PocketChef selected YOLO-Seg ingredient context plus user typed question from Snapshot Sheet
decision_artifact: Ollama /api/chat streaming response on local LAN

Run.policy: keep_alive=10m, shorter answer budget, streaming TTFT measurement

Comp.policy: prompt lowering into compact structured context, num_predict=140

All.policy: keep_alive=10m plus prompt lowering and shortest answer budget

system_rules: answer as PocketChef visual food assistant
use only detected ingredients as visual facts

sample_questions: What can I cook from this?
How do I make it higher protein?
notes: This artifact is the PocketChef schema for local free LLM serving benchmarks.
The iOS app displays live metrics and can copy a single-run benchmark JSON after each Ask LLM request.
Replace null metrics with measured values after running Ollama on the local Mac.
